title: Signal Backup Recovery Key Targeting
summary: [P1] Russian hackers are targeting Signal backup recovery keys, which could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive information. There is no patch currently available, and users should monitor their accounts for suspicious activity. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): Russian hackers are targeting Signal backup recovery keys. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The problem type is credential_compromise because the attackers are targeting Signal backup recovery keys, which could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive information.
